description: Whole-solution Release build: the entire Guardrails.sln builds in Release in solution context after all harness milestones (M1-M5) land - catching a project that builds alone but breaks the solution. A plain build task that the terminal integration-gate sink (task 31) depends on - NOT itself an integrationGate sink (plan §3.3 requires exactly one integrationGate sink, which is task 31).
